titlestmt.titleproper: Farmers Union of the New York Milk Shed records1858
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Katherine Jacklin

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-12-30 23:05:17 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Farmers Union of the New York Milk Shed records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Farmers\' Union of the New York Milk Shed

did.physdesc: Correspondence, mimeographs, scrapbooks, newspapers, book, broadside.
did.abstract: Correspondence of Archie Wright, president, and Alfred C. Kuchler, secretary-treasurer of the Farmers' Union of the New York Milk Shed; copies of speeches and articles; mimeographed letters and bulletins; reports, minutes, broadsides, scrapbooks for 1940-55, and miscellaneous papers. Correspondents include persons prominent in New York agriculture and politics. Other materials are papers of or about County organizations of the Farmers' Union, annual conventions, the Dairy Farmers' Union, and various organizations, agencies, and publications dealing with dairy farming in the state.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence of Archie Wright, president, and Alfred C. Kuchler, secretary-treasurer of the Farmers' Union of the New York Milk Shed; copies of speeches and articles; mimeographed letters and bulletins; reports, minutes, broadsides, scrapbooks for 1940-55, and miscellaneous papers. Correspondents include persons prominent in New York agriculture and politics. Other materials are papers of or about County organizations of the Farmers' Union, annual conventions, the Dairy Farmers' Union, and various organizations, agencies, and publications dealing with dairy farming in the state.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Farmers' Union of the New York Milk Shed records, #1858. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Health, Dept. of, New York City,
National Farmers Union, Board of Directors,
Rural New Yorker, Wm. F. Berghold, Ed.,
Watertown Daily Times, Harold B. Johnson, Ed.,
Northeastern Union Farmer, bound files with index;
Letters, Minutes of Borad of County Presidents, etc.,

Farmers Union Federation of Cooperatives, Inc. - Certificates of Incorporation, N.Y.S., Oct. 26, 1945; Charter granted to Northeastern Farmers Union by the Farmers Educational and Co-operative Union of America, July 31, 1944; Farmer's Union: James G. Patton, Pres., Emil Loriks, Sec'y
NFU: Archie Wright, Pres.; Leslie (Porteous?) Sec'y-Treas.
Newspaper Clippings, 1942 (affiliation of DFU and United Mine Workers John L. Lewis)
The Union Farmer, Ogdensburg, later Utica
The Union Farmer, Ogdensburg, later Utica
Book: MILK FOOD by Paul Corey (Abelard-Schuman: New York, 1956), 189 pp.; placed with papers per EMF, Feb. 9, 1960
Broadside: #2154 "Dairymen, It's Time to Revolt..." Card entry: "Dairy indusrty"
Broadside: #2154 "Dairymen, It's Time to Revolt..." Card entry: "Dairy indusrty"
